mapper.sql: select distinct r.repair_id, r.repair_no, r.asset_id, r.asset_code, r.asset_name, r.repair_status, r.report_time, r.apply_user_id, apply_user.nick_name as apply_user_name, r.apply_dept_id, apply_dept.dept_name as apply_dept_name, r.approve_user_id, approve_user.nick_name as approve_user_name, r.approve_time, r.approve_result, r.fault_desc, r.repair_mode, r.vendor_name, r.repair_cost, r.downtime_hours, r.rework_flag, r.send_repair_time, r.finish_time, r.result_type, r.before_status, r.after_status, r.attachment_count, ifnull(item_cnt.item_count, 0) as item_count, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from asset_repair_order r left join sys_user apply_user on apply_user.user_id = r.apply_user_id left join sys_user approve_user on approve_user.user_id = r.approve_user_id left join sys_dept apply_dept on apply_dept.dept_id = r.apply_dept_id left join ( select repair_id, count(1) as item_count from asset_repair_order_item where del_flag = '0' group by repair_id ) item_cnt on item_cnt.repair_id = r.repair_id left join ( select distinct repair_id, dept_id from ( select repair_id, apply_dept_id as dept_id from asset_repair_order where del_flag = '0' and apply_dept_id is not null union all select r.repair_id, a.use_org_dept_id as dept_id from asset_repair_order r inner join asset_info a on a.asset_id = r.asset_id and a.del_flag = '0' where r.del_flag = '0' and a.use_org_dept_id is not null ) repair_scope_union ) scope_dept on scope_dept.repair_id = r.repair_id left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = r.apply_user_id
mapper.select: select i.repair_item_id, i.repair_id, i.asset_id, i.asset_code, i.asset_name, i.fault_desc, i.before_status, i.after_status, i.result_type, i.repair_cost, i.downtime_hours, i.rework_flag, i.sort_order, i.status, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from asset_repair_order_item i where i.repair_id = #{repairId} and i.del_flag = '0' order by i.sort_order asc, i.repair_item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into asset_repair_order ( repair_no, asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, repair_status, report_time, apply_user_id, apply_dept_id, approve_user_id, approve_time, approve_result, fault_desc, repair_mode, vendor_name, repair_cost, downtime_hours, rework_flag, send_repair_time, finish_time, result_type, before_status, after_status, attachment_count, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{repairNo}, #{assetId}, #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{repairStatus}, #{reportTime}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyDeptId}, #{approveUserId}, #{approveTime}, #{approveResult}, #{faultDesc}, #{repairMode}, #{vendorName}, #{repairCost}, #{downtimeHours}, #{reworkFlag}, #{sendRepairTime}, #{finishTime}, #{resultType}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{attachmentCount}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update asset_repair_order set attachment_count = #{attachmentCount}, update_time = sysdate() where repair_id = #{repairId}

update asset_repair_order set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where repair_id in
#{repairId}
mapper.insert:
insert into asset_repair_order_item ( repair_id, asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, fault_desc, before_status, after_status, result_type, repair_cost, downtime_hours, rework_flag, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values
( #{item.repairId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.assetCode}, #{item.assetName}, #{item.faultDesc}, #{item.beforeStatus}, #{item.afterStatus}, #{item.resultType}, #{item.repairCost}, #{item.downtimeHours}, #{item.reworkFlag}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.status}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate(), #{item.updateBy}, sysdate(), #{item.remark} )
